status: Fixed in Team pre-commit compaction lane
finding: A valid Team hook gate can make commit recovery noisy and slow when several stale active Team runs exist: pre-commit repeats `ATM_TEAM_GIT_OWNER_REQUIRED` for each active run and prints the full staged file list many times, while also reporting the separate framework-claim prerequisite.
expectedBehavior: Pre-commit should compact duplicate Team git-owner blockers by task/run family, show one staged-file summary, and prioritize the shortest ordered recovery path: framework-mode claim first, then retry with `ATM_COMMIT_ACTOR_ID=coordinator git commit`. Stale active Team runs should be summarized with exact lifecycle cleanup commands when they are not related to the current commit.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by compacting multiple git-owner Team blockers in `evaluateTeamPreCommitGate()` into one finding with `teamRunIds`, `taskIds`, one staged file summary, and the same coordinator commit recovery command. Verification: `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case hook-team-gate` covers two active Team runs and asserts a single `ATM_TEAM_GIT_OWNER_REQUIRED` finding.
followUp: Keep the hook-team-gate regression focused on duplicate blocker compaction; lifecycle cleanup hints for unrelated stale runs can be expanded in a later Team runtime UX slice.
